<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `cc-journal backfill`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal backfill [FLAGS]`

Retroactively summarize recent sessions

## Flags

### `--since <DURATION>`

How far back to look (e.g. 1d, 2h, 30m)

**Default:** `3d`

### `--rolling`

Use rolling duration instead of aligned (days=midnight, hours=top-of-hour)

### `--dry-run`

Show what would be summarized without writing

### `--force`

Re-summarize sessions even if already journaled
